what_was_done: Fixed TTS long-response bug via Stop hook signal file. Created hooks/tts_signal.py (writes /tmp/voice-tts-signal.json with full response). Added pending marker (/tmp/voice-tts-pending) so only voice-initiated responses trigger TTS. Fixed intermittent skip with onended poll restart. Removed tmux scraping (extract_last_response, capture_tmux_pane, poll_for_response). Works on iPad Safari and Chrome PC.
